****Situtaion:**** Missed the fact that SPT wasn't running on several VLANs, and that automatically generated commands had also been created.

**Root cause:** ignored root inconsistent alerts. Didn't check configs. 

**Lessons learned** : Don't get lazy. Always check configs. Also don't ignore evidence because It's convenient to.
